## Notes

This scanner is intentionally broad. GUI/rendering destroys are not the same as priest destroys. Proxy lifecycle is not the same as visible-priest lifecycle. The next Stage 4 pass should separate visible-priest destruction, station-authorized cleanup, proxy lifecycle, rendering cleanup, and GUI element destruction.
